item.title: My Grandpa Is a BL Writer
item.description:
Country: TH

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: Ep 3 — May 23, 2026

To save his family's orphanage from foreclosure, a macho 75-year-old novelist must team up with his Gen Z grandson to write a hit BL novel.

View on TMDB
item.content:encoded:
Country: TH

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: Ep 3 — May 23, 2026

To save his family's orphanage from foreclosure, a macho 75-year-old novelist must team up with his Gen Z grandson to write a hit BL novel.

View on TMDB

item.title: Bleach
item.description:
Country: JP

Total Episodes: 406

For as long as he can remember, Ichigo Kurosaki has been able to see ghosts. But when he meets Rukia, a Soul Reaper who battles evil spirits known as Hollows, he finds his life is changed forever. Now, with a newfound wealth of spiritual energy, Ichigo discovers his true calling: to protect the living and the dead from evil.

View on TMDB
item.content:encoded:
Country: JP

Total Episodes: 406

For as long as he can remember, Ichigo Kurosaki has been able to see ghosts. But when he meets Rukia, a Soul Reaper who battles evil spirits known as Hollows, he finds his life is changed forever. Now, with a newfound wealth of spiritual energy, Ichigo discovers his true calling: to protect the living and the dead from evil.

item.title: Bommi BA BL
item.description:
Country: IN

Total Episodes: 1

Child bride Bommi's unlikely savior? Anirudh. Their marriage becomes a fight for equality.

item.title: Game Over: The BL Series
item.description:
Country: US

Total Episodes: 4

A story of love mixed with play and greed. A love that is forced to be corrected and interpreted. But how can he resist the temptation in the environment when the temptation itself is approaching. Will he play? Or take a chance? How can he say Game Over?

View on TMDB

Country: US

Total Episodes: 4

A story of love mixed with play and greed. A love that is forced to be corrected and interpreted. But how can he resist the temptation in the environment when the temptation itself is approaching. Will he play? Or take a chance? How can he say Game Over?

Total Episodes: 1

item.title: You’re My Star: A Christmas BL Special
item.description:
Country: US

Total Episodes: 3

Our way of saying thank you to all our supporters is giving you an inspiring stories that will surely make u fall in love…and let us all spread love and kindness specially this christmas
